free_text: Total Strength of the Magnetic Dipole Resonance in 27Al
English translation
ESU-5 NSC KIPT accelerator.
The target was prepared by knocking in aluminum
ions into a tantalum substrate directly in the
electromagnetic separator. The target used has a
thichess of 20 micro-g in cm2.
One germanium- lithium detector is  used with
an active volume of  60 cm**3 and a resolution of 4.0
keV at Eg=1.33 MeV. The detector was located at a
distance of 5 cm from target at an angle of 55 degrees.
NaI(Tl) detector was used for  excitation
function measurements  and  as monitor of gamma
radiation. The dimensions of the crystal  was
diameter 15 x 10 cm. The detector was located at a
distance of 5 cm from target at an angle of 55 degrees
with respect to he proton beam.
No information.
UKRNDC
Subents 003-004 were added.
Approved by A.S.Kachan.

Data (Fig.1 in reference, upper curve) were
